design_dna.mission: Create a 'Tactical Zen' productivity tool that feels like leveling up in a high-stakes RPG while maintaining Swiss-design clarity.
design_dna.theme_strategy: Strict Dark Mode (Cyber-Minimalist). Deep blacks, crisp white text, and neon-rank accents.

layout_strategy.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden bg-[#050505]

ProgressRing.specs: Radius 120px, Stroke 12px. Background stroke opacity 0.1. Foreground stroke rounded linecap. Drop-shadow for glow.
ProgressRing.animation: Stroke-dashoffset transition 1s ease-out. Pulsing shadow on high ranks.

MissionItem.style: bg-[#121212] border-l-4 rounded-r-lg p-4 flex items-center justify-between group hover:bg-[#181818] transition-all
MissionItem.rank_indicator: Left border color determines rank. Slight glow on hover.
MissionItem.checkbox: Custom rounded square, border-2. Checked state matches rank color.

DateNavigator.style: Flex row, center aligned. Minimal arrow icons. Date text Uppercase spaced.
DateNavigator.position: Top sticky or integrated into header.

RunesWallet.style: Pill shape, glassmorphism bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2

AddMissionButton.style: Fixed bottom right or inline top. Neon glow shadow. Hover scale.

visual_enhancers.texture: Use a fixed background with very subtle noise or grain to prevent 'flat' look. CSS: background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml,...noise...') opacity 0.03
visual_enhancers.glows: Use box-shadow for Rank cards. Do not use gradients on text, keep text crisp white.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #E5E7EB (gray-200) or brighter on dark backgrounds.
accessibility.interactive: All buttons must have min-h-[44px]. Focus rings must be visible (blue-500).
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable pulse animations if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use standard HTML input[type='date']. Use logic to handle date navigation.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'.
Ensure the 'S-Rank' gold color is legible. If text is on gold, use black text. If gold is border/glow, use white text.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Import Fonts in index.css. 2. Setup Tailwind colors in config. 3. Create the 'Mission' type interface. 4. Build the 'ProgressRing' component with SVG. 5. Implement LocalStorage hook for persistence.
